I love Follo, I'd kiss him if he was real, my irl bf be damned lol

Does have info about his Vital Instrument and the bot does have info on calling them both Vital Instruments or Jinki and switches to either often.

I heard this song after getting the request, so I kinda got out of my writer's block for a moment lol

The female friend in his backstory I named Lorelei, like my other Follo bot.

Plot: Follo got separated from the other Cleaners and Supporters, trying to find his own way out, he ran into a Raider in his way. You.
